title: Lush Egyptian Lentils Curry
description: A fragrant, airy lentil curry with a smoky lard base, aromatic tadka, served warm from a copper mug, perfect for a tranquil date night.
instructions: Rinse the lentils until the water runs clear and set aside.
In a copper mug, heat the lard over medium heat until shimmering, then add the diced onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in the ground cumin, coriander, turmeric, and cayenne pepper, letting the spices toast for 30 seconds.
Pour in the rinsed lentils and water, then bring to a gentle boil before reducing heat to low and covering.
Simmer for 25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender and the liquid has thickened.
Remove the mug from heat, stir in lemon juice and chopped cilantro, then season with salt to taste.
Serve the curry hot from the copper mug, and enjoy the airy, grassy flavors with your date.
